description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 95.

Heroic Path: Nightingale

Prerequisite: Spellcasting or Pact Magic Tier I: Spellblade

Arcane Edge. When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, you can channel magical energy through the blade. The attack deals force damage instead of its usual damage type, and the creature has disadvantage on its first saving throw against a spell you cast before the end of your next turn.

Spell & Blade. When you cast a spell, you can make one melee weapon attack against a creature within your melee range as a bonus action.

Spellstrike. When you cast a spell of 5th level or lower that requires a spell attack roll, you can deliver it through a melee weapon attack instead. Make one melee weapon attack roll. On a hit, the attack deals its normal damage, and the spell takes effect without requiring a separate attack roll. You can only use Spellstrike once per round. Heroic Perk: Spellblade’s Retort

Prerequisite: Spellblade

Your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks. When a creature misses you with a melee attack, you can use your reaction to immediately make one melee weapon attack or cast a spell of 5th level or lower that targets only that creature. Tier II: Arcane Duelist

Prerequisite: Spellblade’s Retort

Spellblade Mastery. You can deliver any spell of 5th level or lower that has a casting time of one action or one bonus action through your Spellstrike, not just spells that would require an attack roll. When you do so, the spell only affects the target you hit, even if it is an area spell or a spell that targets multiple creatures. Spells delivered through Spellstrike that would normally require a saving throw instead take full effect automatically on a hit. Subsequent saving throws beyond the first one, such as those required by the Flesh to Stone spell, are rolled as normal. A creature that possesses Legendary Points or Legendary Resistances can expend 1 Legendary Point to avoid being affected by a spell delivered through Spellstrike.

Parrying Cast. When you take the Dodge action, you can cast a spell of 5th level or lower as part of that same action. Heroic Perk: Lethal Cadence

Prerequisite: Arcane Duelist

Your Dexterity score increases by 2, as does your maximum for that score. When you use your Spellstrike feature, you can make an additional attack as part of the

Cast a Spell action. In addition, you can take the Dodge action as a bonus action on your turn. Tier III: Nightingale

Prerequisite: Arcane Duelist, Lethal Cadence

Nightingale’s Prowess. You can deliver spells of up to 7th level through your Spellstrike that have a casting time of one action or bonus action.

Arcane Arsenal. Whenever you use your Spellstrike feature, a phantom duplicate of the weapon you used for the attack materializes and orbits you. You can have a maximum of 6 phantom weapons active simultaneously. Each phantom weapon lasts for 1 minute or until dismissed.

You can use your phantom weapons in two ways:

Launch: As a bonus action, you launch a number of phantom weapons of your choice at a target within 60 feet. Each weapon makes a separate attack using the same attack bonus and damage profile as the weapon that created it. A phantom weapon deals force damage instead of its normal type. After making the attack, the phantom weapon is consumed and disappears.

Spellforge: As a bonus action, you consume any number of phantom weapons to cast a spell without expending a spell slot. The level of the spell you can cast equals the number of phantom weapons consumed–consuming 3 phantom weapons casts a spell of 3rd level, consuming 5 phantom weapons casts a spell of 5th level, and so on. You must know or have prepared the spell you wish to cast, and you must have the required components.

Path Connections

Arcane Marksman. Instead of the Spellblade’s Retort Heroic Perk, you can take the Magical Geometry Perk, changing to the Arcane Marksman path.

Shadowblade. Instead of the Spellblade’s Retort Heroic Perk, you can take the Death Mark Perk, changing to the Shadowblade path.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
